templates.wantPattern: {giver} needs someone to learn why {landmark} has changed before the change reaches {settlement}.
templates.claimPattern: {giver} says {landmark} lies {direction}, at zone {destinationZone}. Go there and recover {token} as proof of what the place is doing.

templates.wantPattern: {giver} cannot settle a local obligation until somebody recovers a trace from {landmark}.
templates.claimPattern: A usable trace remains at {landmark}, {direction} in zone {destinationZone}. Reaching it will make {token} real enough to carry.

templates.wantPattern: {giver} wants {district} to have a witness no official account can quietly replace.
templates.claimPattern: {landmark} can supply that witness. It is {direction}, in zone {destinationZone}; find {token} there.

templates.wantPattern: {giver} needs a local answer from {landmark} before offering help to anyone else.
templates.claimPattern: The answer waits {direction} at {landmark}, zone {destinationZone}. A traveler who arrives will find {token}.

handoffs.spokenPattern: The reaping list has {settlement} on it -- I watched the clerks copying the schedule. Go {direction} and find {contact} before the sweep does; tell them what you saw in this yard.
handoffs.objectivePattern: Reach {settlement}, {direction}, and warn {contact} that the imperial sweep is coming for them.

handoffs.spokenPattern: Go to {settlement}, {direction}, and ask for {contact}. They saw something the officials need everyone else to forget.
handoffs.objectivePattern: Reach {settlement}, {direction}, and speak with {contact} about the missing witness.

handoffs.spokenPattern: Ask for {contact} in {settlement}, {direction}. The road there has stopped honoring an old promise, and they know who broke it.
handoffs.objectivePattern: Reach {settlement}, {direction}, and speak with {contact} about the road's broken promise.

handoffs.spokenPattern: A confiscated color is being held near {settlement}, {direction}. Bring the {item} back to me before it learns an official name.
handoffs.objectivePattern: Recover the {item} near {settlement}, {direction}, then return to {speaker}.

handoffs.spokenPattern: Carry this {item} to {contact} in {settlement}, {direction}. Put it in their hands, then come tell me it arrived.
handoffs.objectivePattern: Deliver the {item} to {contact} in {settlement}, {direction}, then return to {speaker}.

handoffs.spokenPattern: Find {contact} in {settlement}, {direction}. Persuade them to travel with you and bring them safely back to me.
handoffs.objectivePattern: Find {contact} in {settlement}, persuade them to follow, and return together to {speaker}.

handoffs.spokenPattern: The {threat} waits near {settlement}, {direction}. End the danger however you can, then return and tell me what became of it.
handoffs.objectivePattern: Resolve the {threat} near {settlement} by force, alliance, displacement, restraint, transformation, or satisfaction; then return to {speaker}.

handoffs.spokenPattern: A practitioner near {settlement}, {direction}, still offers {service}. Ask them to perform it, then return without giving the Censorate their name.
handoffs.objectivePattern: Have the {service} performed near {settlement}, then return to {speaker}.

handoffs.spokenPattern: Speak with {contact} in {settlement}, {direction}. They heard {rumor}; bring me their version, not the Empire's.
handoffs.objectivePattern: Ask {contact} in {settlement} about {rumor}, then return to {speaker}.

handoffs.spokenPattern: Find {contact} in {settlement}, {direction}. Win their help, change what they want, or make their present allegiance impossible; then report back.
handoffs.objectivePattern: Gain leverage over {contact} in {settlement} through trust, recruitment, changed desire, fear, or allegiance; then return to {speaker}.
